summary: Accident detection system with dual input: manual reporting and AI-powered image analysis of accident scenes, with interactive map for location marking
architectural_notes: Uses multimodal vision AI for accident scene image analysis
Interactive map with simulated location data (no real GPS)
Motoko backend for accident record storage
Dual detection: manual reports + AI image analysis

existing_features.title: Create a manual accident reporting interface that allows users to quickly report accidents they witness, capturing essential details like timestamp and description
Implement image upload functionality that allows users to upload accident scene photos for AI-powered analysis to detect and confirm accidents
Add AI-powered accident scene analysis that processes uploaded images using multimodal vision to detect vehicles, damage, debris, and other accident indicators
Create an interactive map component with pin-dropping functionality that allows users to mark the precise location where an accident occurred
Create an accident history view that displays all reported accidents with their locations, images, detection method, and timestamps in a list or grid format

Design a cohesive visual theme with emergency-focused color palette (red, amber, white, dark grays), clear typography for high-visibility alerts, and consistent layout patterns across accident reporting, map, and history views

new_feature_requests.summary: Image upload with AI analysis for accident scene detection
Interactive map with pin-dropping for accident location marking
Extend the Motoko backend to store accident records including detection method (manual or AI-analyzed), location coordinates, timestamp, images, description, and analysis results
